claim.summary: Lane 2 validated Main Flow strict body contact slot assets for nodes 999-1017, filled two zero-valued active masks from same-scene fallback masks, and produced a Lane 1 request for the remaining zero-valued character_b_body_mask.png blocker.

settings.validation_method: existence, SHA256, image dimensions, luminance occupancy for masks
